title: briza microstachya
intro: Briza microstachya, also known as Quaking Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its delicate and feathery plumes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Briza microstachya include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Briza microstachya can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
